creator: viktor.stujber+freebsd-bugs_v4CCPfay@gmail.com
text:
Freebsd HEAD running on the intel atom board I have does not provide
C-state power management, all cores run at full power.  BIOS is updated
to latest version.

The motherboard is:
http://www.intel.com/cd/products/services/emea/eng/motherboards/desktop/D525MW/overview/453835.htm
